description_long: This is a vintage-style cup featuring a cylindrical glass vessel held within an ornate, dark bronze or brass holder. The metal holder is decorated with intricate Celtic or Nordic-inspired patterns, adding a historical and decorative touch. The base of the holder is flared and sturdy, with a greenish patina suggesting age or intentional antiquing. A single, elegantly curved handle is attached to the side, allowing for easy gripping. The glass portion is clear but appears slightly weathered or frosted, contrasting with the metallic holder. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and artistry, suitable for both display and practical use.
description: A vintage glass cup set in an ornate bronze holder with decorative patterns and a curved handle. The design combines clear glass with aged, patinaed metal for a historical look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed decorative pattern on the metal holder and the straight handle aligned at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elegantly curved handle and the full profile of the glass and metal holder.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle centered, displaying the engraved pattern on the handle and the back of the holder.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's attachment and the uninterrupted metal pattern on the holder.
